scripts.dev:desktop: concurrently -k "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 -t 60000 && npm run dev --workspace=desktop"
scripts.build: npm --workspace api run build && npm --workspace web run build
scripts.ci:build: npm run prisma:generate && npm run build --workspace=api && npm run build --workspace=web
scripts.build:desktop: npm run build:lan-p2p && npm run build --workspace=api && cross-env BUILD_DESKTOP=1 NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4000/api npm run build --workspace=web && npm run prepare-standalone --workspace=desktop && npm run download-node --workspace=desktop && npm run prepare-embedded-backend --workspace=desktop && npm run write-version --workspace=desktop && npm run build --workspace=desktop
scripts.build:desktop:release: npm run build:lan-p2p && npm run build --workspace=api && cross-env BUILD_DESKTOP=1 NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4000/api npm run build --workspace=web && npm run prepare-standalone --workspace=desktop && npm run download-node --workspace=desktop && npm run prepare-embedded-backend --workspace=desktop && npm run write-version --workspace=desktop && npm run build:release --workspace=desktop
scripts.build:desktop:clean: npm run clean --workspace=desktop && npm run build:desktop
scripts.lint: npm --workspace api run lint && npm --workspace web run lint
